title: The Division 2 Subreddit
description: Unofficial Reddit community with wiki links, FAQs, guides, vendor reset discussion, and player help. One of the most active community hubs for the franchise.

title: Community Wiki
description: Community-maintained Division 2 reference hub with guides, FAQs, useful links, resources, and player-discovered intel.

title: Division 2 Discord
description: Official and fan-run Discord servers for real-time chat, LFG (looking for group), build advice, seasonal events, and news.

title: MX Division Build Tool
description: Community build companion and theorycrafting tool for build planning and sharing. Simulate gear, talents, and stat combinations before grinding.

title: Hi-Dep Vendor Reset Tool
description: Weekly vendor intel for Division 2 gear, weapons, named items, mods, and rolls worth checking each Thursday before the server reset.

title: Hi-Dep Escalation Event Tool
description: Daily Escalation intel for targeted loot locations and Requisition Vendor offerings for The Division 2.

title: Hi-Dep Division 2 Tools
description: Vendor, cost, brandset, gearset, exotic, talent, blueprint, and Descent reference tools for The Division 2.

title: Division 2 Gear Sheet
description: Community spreadsheet reference for gear sets, brand bonuses, talents, and attributes. Maintained by dedicated community members.

title: Interactive Division 2 Map
description: Agent field map for tracking collectibles, control points, SHD tech, comms, activities, and key open-world locations across Washington D.C.

title: The Division 2 Wiki (Fandom)
description: Comprehensive Fandom wiki covering gear sets, weapons, missions, lore, exotics, world tiers, specializations, and game mechanics.

title: Official Ubisoft Discord
description: Official Ubisoft Discord where the dev team posts patch news, answers questions, and players discuss issues, feedback, and gameplay.
